title: CCTV in operation Sign - 1mm Rigid Plastic Sign - Warning Construction CCTV camera Security (A5-210 x 148mm)
features: Site Safety Message: Communicate essential site rules and hazards clearly to contractors and visitors to reduce risk around active works, plant and traffic routes

ISO 7010 Compliant: Standardised symbols and clear text improve recognition and help staff and visitors understand safety instructions quickly, supporting consistent communication across UK workplaces
Ideal for offices, warehouses, hospitality, education, healthcare and construction sites; high‑contrast design for corridors, entrances and shared areas.
Material Option: Rigid Plastic — durable rigid substrate for a crisp print and long‑lasting presentation; mount with screws or high‑bond tape indoors or outdoors
Size: 210 × 148 Millimeters (8.3 × 5.8 in). Application: peel & stick for vinyl; screw or adhesive pads for rigid plastic. Clean, dry surface ensures best adhesion.
description: CCTV in operation Sign - Construction Site Safety Provide clear, visible guidance to support safer workplaces and faster decisions. Simple layouts help messages be recognised quickly in busy areas. Designed in line with ISO 7010 standards for Construction Site Safety signage. Available sizes include A5 (148 210 Millimeters / 5.8 8.3 in). ISO 7010 symbols support fast recognition and consistent safety communication Clear text and icons help staff, visitors and contractors follow site rules Suitable for entrances, corridors, plant rooms, warehouses and public spaces Rigid Plastic option for reliable presentation and easy installation on suitable surfaces A5 size helps legibility at appropriate viewing distance Choose the right option for your surface and viewing distance to maximise visibility and compliance. Application: Mount with screws, cable ties or highbond tape on clean surfaces; suitable indoors and outdoors CCTV in operation Sign - Construction Site Safety delivers clear, highly legible messaging to guide safer behaviour and faster decisionmaking in busy environments. Highcontrast layouts and recognised symbols help people notice, read and act on your instructions without delay. Designed in line with ISO 7010 standards for Construction Site Safety signage. Available size example: A5 (148 210 Millimeters / 5.8 8.3 in). Design & Readability: Consistent typography, colour and iconography improve recognition at a glance. Placing the sign at eye level in welllit areas increases visibility and reduces the risk of missed guidance during normal operations or emergencies. Placement Guidance: Position at decision points such as doorways, junctions and entrances so the message is seen when it matters.
